nodes.label: Learning Lab / Lesson List Screen Wireframe
nodes.description: Mobile course detail screen for 'Advanced Prompt Engineering'. Shows progress (3 of 8 lessons completed, 2h 15m total), tab bar (Main Path, Supplemental Lessons, Mini-Assignments), a vertical list of 8 lessons with completion status icons, time estimates, and an 'In Progress' badge on Lesson 4. A 'Start Lesson' CTA button is at the bottom with the help-cat widget in the corner.
